summary: Regression re-test after ObjectId serialization fix in POST /api/orders. All three regression items PASS. Backend order create + status update return HTTP 200 with clean schema (no _id/ObjectId leakage). Frontend New order dialog end-to-end (login -> customer select -> add item -> product select -> submit) creates the order without 500 and it appears in the orders table with 'Order created' toast.
passed: POST /api/orders (2 items, tax_rate=10) -> HTTP 200; order_number=ORD-00022, subtotal=175.00, tax=17.50, total=192.50; response contains id/owner_id/items/status/payment_status only (no _id/ObjectId leakage)
PUT /api/orders/{id}/status?status=completed -> HTTP 200; status transitions to 'completed', payload cleanly serialized

Frontend /app/orders: New order dialog opens, native <select> customer picker chooses Maria Silva, Add item -> product select picks Leather Wallet, Create order dismisses dialog and 'Order created' toast appears
Table refresh shows ORD-00023 at top (orders count 22 -> 23), no console errors during creation
